The Real Problem

Most Guitarists Never Reach Their Potential.

Not because they lack talent. Not because they don't put in the hours. It's because they're practicing without a clear direction. Working hard on the wrong things, building habits that slow them down without even knowing it.


The Practice Room Coaching Program changes that. I'll pinpoint exactly what's holding you back and build a plan around your playing, so every hour you put in moves you closer to the guitarist you actually want to be.

What You Get

Everything You Need.
Nothing You Don't.

Six things working together to make sure your practice actually pays off.

01
Know Exactly What To Fix
We start with a private 1-on-1 video call where I identify what's actually slowing you down, so your very first practice session is already pointed at the right target.
02
Keep Moving Forward Every Month
A 30-minute private lesson with me each month keeps you honest, adjusted, and progressing. No more plateaus, no more guessing if you're doing it right.
03
Always Know What To Practice
A personalised 12-week plan built around your goals and current level, so you never sit down and wonder where to start again.
04
Material Built Around You
I use my existing courses as part of your coaching, and if something isn't covered, I create the material you need. You get exactly what helps you progress, nothing that doesn't.
05
Catch Bad Habits Before They Stick
Submit your practice videos and get direct feedback from me. Small corrections early save months of undoing bad habits later.
06
Unlimited Help Whenever You Need It
Every member gets a personal coaching thread where you can reach me via video or text at any time. You're never stuck waiting for your next lesson to get unblocked.
How It Works

A System Built Around You.

Every member starts with a 1-on-1 call where I assess your playing, identify the gaps, and build a 12-week plan specific to your goals. From there, we meet monthly to review, adjust, and keep your progress on track.


In between, you have access to tailored material, direct video feedback, and a personal coaching thread so you can reach me whenever you're stuck. Everything working together so your practice time actually counts.

About Me

Jon Bjork

I've been playing guitar since 1992 and studied at the Guitar Institute of Technology in Los Angeles, learning from musicians like Brett Garsed and T.J. Helmerich.

I started teaching full-time in 2001 and have worked with students at every level ever since. I've also spent years composing orchestral music, nearly 700 tracks for Epidemic Sound, heard on channels like MrBeast and Hot Ones.

The Practice Room Coaching Program is the experience I wished I'd had when I was stuck. My goal is simple: make the path to better playing as clear and direct as possible for every single member.
